message:
feat: PaneStepExecutor — real pane dispatch for transactional step execution

Implement PaneStepExecutor<P, A, T> that dispatches tx plan steps to real
panes via WeztermInterface, replacing the synthetic-only execution path with
one that actually sends text, waits for output, and manages pane state.

Core implementation:
- PaneStepExecutor wraps a WeztermHandle and delegates prepare-phase gate
  evaluation to PolicyPrepareStepExecutor for real policy/approval/target
  checking
- execute_step_action() dispatches each StepAction variant to the backend:
  - SendText: sends text to a pane via handle.send_text() or send_text_no_paste()
    depending on paste_mode flag, using spawn_blocking + one-shot runtime
  - WaitFor: polls pane output via handle.get_text() at 200ms intervals until
    pattern match or timeout, supporting Pattern/PaneIdle/StableTail conditions
  - StoreData: logs key storage (value stored in tx context, not persisted here)
  - AcquireLock/ReleaseLock: advisory lock operations with tracing
  - MarkEventHandled: event acknowledgment with tracing
  - ValidateApproval: advisory approval validation pass
  - RunWorkflow/NestedPlan/Custom: explicitly unsupported with FTX_UNSUPPORTED
    error codes
- Failure boundary semantics: after any step failure, remaining steps are
  marked skipped_after_failure with FTX_SKIPPED error code
- Compensation path: reports success for committed steps (actual rollback
  actions deferred to follow-up bead ft-y9lnb.4 which will add async
  execution with contract reference)
- Deterministic failure injection preserved via fail_step/fail_for_step params

Tests (12 new tests):
- pane_executor_send_text_happy_path: 3-step SendText sequence succeeds
- pane_executor_send_text_pane_not_found: missing pane returns send_text_failed
- pane_executor_wait_for_match: pattern match in pane output succeeds
- pane_executor_wait_for_timeout: unmatched pattern times out correctly
- pane_executor_store_data_succeeds: StoreData always succeeds
- pane_executor_unsupported_action_run_workflow: RunWorkflow returns unsupported
- pane_executor_fail_step_injection: deterministic failure at named step
- pane_executor_mixed_steps_failure_boundary: failure cascades to skip remaining
- pane_executor_compensations_happy_path: committed steps get compensated
- pane_executor_compensations_with_failure_injection: injected comp failure
- pane_executor_compensations_empty: no committed steps → no compensations
- pane_executor_evaluate_gates_delegates: gates delegate to PolicyPrepareStepExecutor
- pane_executor_lock_and_event_steps_succeed: lock/event/release flow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
